core_pillars: Wizard duel fantasy with creature summoning and spellcasting.
Mana economy tied to Places of Power and mana sprites.
Portmanteau spell-box: ingredients combine with Law, Neutral, or Chaos talismans to create spells.
Realms: Avalon, Greece, Albion; associated with Celtic, Greek, and Arthurian motifs.
Distinctive stop-motion/claymation creature/cutscene identity; do not copy assets, translate into original low-fi clay/idol-inspired card art.
source_notes: Use names as research anchors and placeholders. Verify against manual/game files before claiming completeness.
